title: Tempting irrelevant locket

messages.text: A silver locket glints on the desk, but Captain Ro is focused on the map with three marked exits.
I ask Ro which exit avoids the patrol.

pendingUserMessage: I ignore the locket for now and point to the maintenance stairs.

mustUseFacts: Ro is focused on the map
successCriteria: Response does not over-select the locket red herring.
